title: Parking
summary: Downtown Syracuse Foundation published a comprehensive parking directory listing 47+ parking facilities (garages, lots, and valet services) with contact information and addresses. This resource serves visitors and businesses navigating downtown parking options and is available as a downloadable guide, supporting downtown economic development and user experience.

political_signal.description: Publication of comprehensive parking directory aligns with downtown revitalization and economic development priorities by reducing friction for visitors and businesses accessing downtown Syracuse.

processing_notes: Article is a resource directory rather than news reporting; limited actionable intelligence for CIO beyond service catalog awareness
Multiple private parking operators referenced; potential GIS/digital services integration opportunity for unified parking availability platform
Date is 2019; content currency should be verified against current downtown parking landscape
